notCovered: QuestionRuntime (Sprint 4, intentionally out of scope — Exam Mode)

runtimeIntegration.summaryCenter: complete (content sparse pending real document parsing — see knownLimitations)
runtimeIntegration.home: complete for sections with a real data source (最近教材/學習統計/繼續學習/今日學習); 今日任務/AI 建議 have no Runtime anywhere, honest permanent Empty State
runtimeIntegration.learningCenter: complete for sections with a real data source (學習總覽/學習記錄-本週/週報告/學習日曆/科目進度); 本月/今年/全部 tabs and 成就徽章 interactions are Disabled + Coming Soon (no historical-period or achievement Runtime exists)

qaRounds.sprint6_6_round3: PASS (WO-008, WO-010; WO-009 investigated, no fix needed)
qaRounds.sprint6_6_final: PASS (Issue #026, #027; Learning Center Runtime Integration complete)

knownLimitations: Summary Center's 五大區塊 are mostly empty for real uploads because MaterialParser/KnowledgeBuilder use Stub Implementation (no real PDF/document text extraction exists in this repo). Not a bug — reflects Sprint 6's documented architecture.
File preview/download on Home's Recent Material cards only works within the same browser session as the upload (File objects can't be persisted to sessionStorage).
今日任務 / AI 老師建議 on Home, and 今日學習重點 on Learning Center, have no Runtime anywhere and permanently show Empty State until a Task Runtime or AI capability is authorized in a future Sprint.
成就徽章 (achievement badges) have no earning-rule Runtime; the illustrative catalog display is unchanged, but its interactive elements (分享成就/查看全部) are honestly Disabled/Coming Soon.
學習記錄/週報告 的 本月/今年/全部 period views require a historical-by-period Runtime that doesn't exist; Disabled + Coming Soon per PMO-sanctioned Option B.
